description: A chibi pixel art superhero with slicked-back blonde hair, piercing blue eyes, and a confident smirk. Wearing a dark navy blue bodysuit with scaled texture pattern, golden eagle-shaped shoulder pads, a golden belt with an eagle buckle, golden arm bracers, dark red leather gloves, and a long red-white-and-blue cape flowing behind. 2.5 head-to-body proportion. Compact, bold, and iconic.
